title: Ironscales-Classify-Incident
content:
Classify an Ironscales incident

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Ironscales pack (Ironscales, partner-supported).

Integrations/scripts used: ironscales-classify-incident, ironscales-get-incident.
